content.value: A mixed review covering the full course - number systems through memory devices. Use this to check your readiness before the midterm or final exam.

quiz.question: Which complement system is used by modern processors for signed arithmetic?
(A.B)' equals which expression by DeMorgan's theorem?
On a K-map, why must groups be sized as powers of 2?
options: It guarantees the group corresponds to a valid simplified product term
